label: mother
groundingNote: someone of one kind: a {urn:molecule-v0:woman|woman} [m]; a {urn:molecule-v0:child|child} [m] was {urn:kernel-v0:birth|born} from inside this someone's body; at many times this someone lives with this {urn:molecule-v0:child|child} [m] for a long time, does many good things for it, feels something very good toward it
notes: NSM universal molecule 'mother' (decomposable via birth, but molecule-status in NSM is about use-as-unit, not primitiveness — Goddard 2010). Covers the single biggest gated lemma cluster: mom+mommy+mum+mama+mother = 2.5%% of top-500 content mass.
